metadata.title: SOXYCLUB - Premium Sock Subscription
metadata.description: Get premium socks delivered to your door every season

hero.title: Simple Comfort,
hero.subtitle: Simplicity for Your Feet.
hero.description1: Custom cotton sock subscription for you and your family.
hero.description2: Global delivery, no pilling, no odor, refresh every season.

painPoints.title: Is Your Drawer Full of "Zombie Socks"?
painPoints.subtitle: Are your drawers stuffed with worn-out socks?

hard.title: Hard & Rough
hard.description: Six-month-old socks feel like cardboard, rough and non-absorbent.

oneSize.title: One Size Fits None
oneSize.description: One size is a lie. Big feet break through toes, small feet slip at heels.

bacteria.title: Hidden Bacteria
bacteria.description: In humid conditions, old cotton socks breed bacteria - source of unremovable odor.

step1.title: Subscribe & Save
step1.subtitle: Save with subscription
step1.description: No brand premium, no store rent, no inventory loss. We save 50% of costs and upgrade fabric quality.

step2.title: Custom Curation
step2.subtitle: Seasonal Management
step2.description: We curate based on seasons. Business, casual, sports - one box covers all life scenarios. 2-3 deliveries per year.

step3.title: Health Cycle
step3.subtitle: Healthy Rotation
step3.description: Each new box is your reminder to toss old socks. Keep feet in "First Day Freshness".

engineering.title: The Engineering
engineering.subtitle: Quality Promise from Supply Chain Experts

material.title: Material
material.description: Combed cotton + DuPont Lycra elastic, solving looseness, maintaining lasting elasticity.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Silver ion/AAA-grade antibacterial technology, specially designed for humid climates.

fit.title: The Fit
fit.description: No "one size". We offer M/L/XL precise sizing, like tailored suits.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Hand-linked toe, no raised seams at toes, ultimate seamless experience.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Select the right package for you

about.title: About SOXY
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.quote: "We are not just selling socks; we are simplifying your life."
about.paragraph1: I have worked in sock supply chains for a decade. I've seen the best socks sold at sky-high prices with logos, and the worst ones flooding street markets. My reason for founding SOXY is simple: break the profiteering, return to essence.
about.paragraph1Bold: Break the profiteering, return to essence.
about.paragraph2: We believe socks are the most overlooked clothing item. Hidden in shoes, they directly determine your all-day comfort. SOXY is committed to eliminating shopping hassles through subscription, so every time you put on shoes, you feel carefully cared for.

subscribe.title: Start Your Subscription
subscribe.subtitle: Start Your Subscription

confirmation.title: Order Summary
confirmation.paymentInfo: After clicking below, you will be taken to a secure payment page. We support credit cards, debit cards, and more.
